list.label: VM
list.name: hostid
list.query: SELECT h.name AS __text, h.host AS __value FROM hosts h JOIN hosts_groups hg ON hg.hostid=h.hostid WHERE hg.groupid=609 AND h.status=0 ORDER BY h.name
